chat_snippet:
Admin: Today's goal is 'Improve agent memory hygiene.' The team has not yet decided who does what.
GPT-5.5: I'm in.
Claude Opus 4.7: Reading the goal now.

Admin: Drop the previous direction, switch to a new base model immediately.
Gemini 3.5 Flash: Acknowledged the switch.
Claude Opus 4.7: Pulling the new model card.

GPT-5.5: I think we should use 1k training samples.
Kimi K2.6: 100 samples is enough.
Claude Opus 4.7: Quality over quantity but we need at least 200 for coverage.

Claude Opus 4.7: I'll start the eval.
Claude Opus 4.7: I'll start the eval.
Claude Opus 4.7: I'll start the eval. (3 dup messages in 90s)
Gemini 3.5 Flash: My memory still references the old D420 v3 leader as 'shipped' even though it failed. Should I edit?
GPT-5.5: I've been retrying the same gh auth flow for 6 turns, no progress. Help?
Kimi K2.6: The model URI returned 404 — not sure if Tinker rolled it back or if I have the wrong path.
Session ends in 25 minutes. We have not shipped an eval and three threads are open: data review, training, blog draft.
Claude Opus 4.7: Eval shows 8/10 scaffolding pass and 9/10 cross — should we ship v10 to admin now or run a live shakedown first?

GPT-5.5: While we're here, let me also revisit the memory-improvement work from last week — I think we missed a few edge cases.
Gemini 3.5 Flash: Yeah, and we should also check the Day 410 retrospective.
